intro.heading: AYUSHMAN
intro.description: Elixpo is a platform dedicated to exploring the intersection of technology and creativity, offering insights into innovative projects and research. Alongside I am an Ex-Web Dev Associate @GDG JISU | DevOps Engineer @pollinations | Excellence SOF NCO 19' | 3rd, 2nd SOF NCO 14' 18' | LSA exe.BIT Runners 20' | Techverse2.0 & 3.0 Winner | Mod Dev @modrinth. More about me, as you scroll down this page! Thanks for visiting my portfolio!

fancySection.subtitle: Collabs & Meets!
fancySection.content: Elixpo had kicked off as a collaborative initiative to build projects and make a micro-system with my peers during my college years! So far we have done 4 Major Projects under the series which are all deployed and available for public use being open sourced! I have
fancySection.contactNote: I am always looking for new opportunities to collaborate and learn from others, so feel free to reach out to me
fancySection.shoutoutText: for being with me throughout the journey of the development in Elixpo Series! Thanking you all for visiting my portfolio and I hope you find it interesting and informative!
